summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.
